allies.rationale_text: Reframing-perspective gives lateral-thinking a practical way to reopen option space by changing the question before changing the answer.
allies.source_quote: Works when the blockage is conceptual, not effort-based.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Lateral-thinking conflicts with representativeness-heuristic when familiar pattern match suppresses alternative framing.
structured_tensions.source_quote: lateral-thinking vs representativeness-heuristic: lateral-thinking conflicts with representativeness-heuristic (representativeness heuristic) when familiar pattern match suppresses alternative framing.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Lateral-thinking conflicts with status-quo-bias when default playbooks crowd out unconventional options.
structured_tensions.source_quote: lateral-thinking vs status-quo-bias: lateral-thinking conflicts with status-quo-bias (status quo bias) when default playbooks crowd out unconventional options.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Lateral-thinking conflicts with confirmation-bias when teams seek only information that supports the existing frame.
structured_tensions.source_quote: lateral-thinking vs confirmation-bias: lateral-thinking conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when teams seek information that confirms the existing frame rather than opening to unconventional alternatives.

curation_notes.summary: Preserved one practical ally and the explicit anti-fixation tension block.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader innovation-neighbor sprawl beyond the clearest current-vocabulary frame-shift link.
open_questions: The outside-view material is source-real but not yet a clean first-order canonical target here.
